title: The Far Window
tagline: A fridge magnet that still opens onto one real place, right now.
holy_shit: A little square on your fridge can still tell you what the air feels like in a city you miss — this exact minute.
powered_by: /track extract cell + Open-Meteo + qr.mjs, verified and fetched in the scanner's browser
agent_scenario: When you need a quiet, location-specific live truth from a printed object, with verify-before-exec and no backend.
author: kody-w + Copilot
